commands.repair_reason: - [P1] Needs human PR review because the external branch is plausible but lacks required real behavior proof and changes the bounded forced-exit timing.; Cleared: The diff only changes CLI stdout shutdown timing in existing source and does not touch dependencies, workflows, secrets, package scripts, or third-party code execution. commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `src/cli.ts` so the forced-exit timer waits for an empty stdout write callback, with a 2s safety timeout, before calling `process.exit`.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked issue gives a concrete greater-than-64KB pipe repro, and current main still emits large JSON through stdout before a timed hard exit with no drain handling; I did not execute the repro in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs human PR review because the external branch is plausible but lacks required real behavior proof and changes the bounded forced-exit timing.

target.title: fix: flush stdout before forced exit to avoid 64KB pipe truncation
target.author: badmoo
